section.heading: Prohibition on use of Central Intelligence Agency services

content.p: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, no use will be made of services, facilities, or personnel of the Central Intelligence Agency.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 90–351, title I, § 815, formerly § 822, as added Pub. L. 96–157, § 2, Dec. 27, 1979, 93 Stat. 1214; renumbered § 815, Pub. L. 98–473, title II, § 609B(f), Oct. 12, 1984, 98 Stat. 2093.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 3789k of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 815 of Pub. L. 90–351 was renumbered section 809 and is classified to section 10228 of this title.
